description: Fix Analytics page - investigate why it is not working and fix the data loading/display issues
steps: INVESTIGATE ANALYTICS PAGE (frontend/app/dashboard/analytics/page.tsx): The analytics page reads from localStorage keys: 'chronai-tasks', 'chronai-pomodoro-stats', and 'chronai-habits'. It expects pomodoro-stats to have a 'sessions' array with {date, minutes} objects. However, the PomodoroTimer (frontend/components/PomodoroTimer.tsx) stores stats in a different format - it stores a simple object with date keys mapping to counts (e.g. {'2025-01-15': 3}), not the {sessions: [{date, minutes}]} format the analytics page expects. This mismatch means the Focus Hours chart will always show 0. Fix the analytics page to read the actual localStorage format used by PomodoroTimer.

FIX POMODORO STATS DATA FORMAT: The PomodoroTimer stores stats as {[dateKey: string]: number} counting completed pomodoros per day (under key 'chronai-pomodoro-stats'). The analytics page expects {sessions: [{date, minutes}], totalMinutes: number}. Fix the analytics page's useEffect that reads pomodoroStats to properly parse the actual format: iterate over the date keys, convert each to {date, minutes: count * focusMinutes}. Since we don't know the exact focus duration used, assume the default 25 minutes per pomodoro. Update the focusHoursPerDay useMemo to work with the corrected data structure.

VERIFY TASKS DATA FORMAT: The tasks page stores tasks as an array of LocalTask objects under 'chronai-tasks'. The analytics page reads these and looks for task.completed and task.completedAt or task.updatedAt. The LocalTask interface has 'completed' as a boolean and uses 'status' for state. There is no 'completedAt' field being set anywhere in the tasks page when a task is completed. Fix: When marking a task as done in the tasks page (handleToggleTask), set a completedAt timestamp. Also update the analytics to fall back to checking status === 'done' if completedAt is not available.
acceptance_criteria: The Analytics page loads without errors and displays charts even when there is data in localStorage
The Focus Hours chart correctly reads the pomodoro stats from the actual localStorage format ({dateKey: count})
The Tasks Completed chart correctly counts tasks that are marked as done
pnpm lint passes with no errors
pnpm build passes with no errors
